## Compliance & Security Checklist
<!-- 
Please review and check the following required items. 
As an enterprise-grade project, we hold PRs to a strict compliance and security standard. 
-->
- [ ] **DCO Sign-off**: My commits are signed off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] **Tests**: New tests have been added for bug fixes or new features, or I have explained why they are not needed.
- [ ] **Documentation**: Any new config, API, or architectural changes have been documented.
- [ ] **Data Privacy (HIPAA/SOC 2)**: This change does not log raw PII/PHI (e.g., chat messages, user passwords) and respects data retention rules.
- [ ] **Security**: This change does not introduce new unfixed vulnerabilities or weaken the existing security posture.
- [ ] **Dependencies**: Any new dependencies strictly follow the FOSS-only guidelines in `DEPENDENCIES.md`.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires RFC / TSC approval per GOVERNANCE.md)
- [ ] Chore / Refactor / Documentation
